case_title: STRAKA, MARILYN VS BUNCKE, HARRY DR., IND. & DBA THE BUNCKE CLINIC et al

docket_entries.description: DEFT'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DENIAL OF MOTION UNDER CCP 473 IS OFF CAL. TRIAL DATE WAS SET FOR 4/24/00. ON 6/15/00, DEFTS FILED MOTION TO VACATE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STRAKA, MARILYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUNCKE, HARRY DR., IND. & DBA THE BUNCKE CLINIC BUNCKE, CONSTANCE DR., IND.& DBA THE BUNCKE CLINIC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,076.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REMANDED WITH NO FILE
10/11/00 THE DEFTS FILED THE HEREIN MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DENIAL OF MOTION TO VACATE UNDER CCP 473. THE HEREIN MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR
PER CCP 116.730(A).
MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BUNCKE, HARRY DR., IND. & DBA THE BUNCKE CLINIC HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE DENIAL OF THE MOTION TO VACATE BUT THEN FILED AN ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL ON 9/12/00 AND A SECOND ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL ON 9/14/00. THEREFORE ON
BECAUSE THE DEFENDANTS REMEDY WAS TO PURSUE THE APPEAL.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BUNCKE, HARRY DR., IND. & DBA THE BUNCKE CLINIC BUNCKE, CONSTANCE DR., IND.& DBA THE BUNCKE CLINIC
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS
